LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEVEN MIYAKE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION/SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO FROM DECEMBER 23, 2016 JANUARY 9, 2017 BECAUSE OF THE LATE FILED OPPOSITION. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AND SERVE AN AMENDED OPPOSING SEPARATE STATEMENT OF FACTS THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1350(F) AND (H) BY DECEMBER 27, 2016. PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE A CITATION TO THE EVIDENCE BY EXHIBIT, TITLE, PAGE, AND LINE NUMBER FOR EACH FACT THAT DISPUTES DEFENDANT'S FACTS. DEFENDANT MAY FILE AND SERVE A REPLY BY JANUARY 4, 2017. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-19-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Truth Of Matters Admitted And To Compel Answers To Discovery
Off Calendar Jan-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Alber Lee of Law Offices of Albert Lee (415)215-6868 appeared for defendant. No other appearances.

Discussion - The Court rules DEFENDANT STEVEN MIYAKE'S Motion To Deem Truth Of Matters Admitted And To Compel Answers To Discovery is moot, summary judgment was granted in favor of defendant. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION / Notice Of Motion For Summary Adjudication/Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALBERT LEE, TEL. NO. 1-415-215-68678 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Steven Miyake's motion for summary judgment is granted. (See Word minutes for details) Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =302/hk

Motion For Summary Adjudication/Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Motion For Summary Adjudication/Summary Judgment is a duplicate entry.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION / Notice Of Motion For Summary Adjudication/Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-23-2016 Continued To Jan-09-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT STEVEN MIYAKE'S Motion For Summary Adjudication/Summary Judgment is CONTINUED to January 9, 2017 because of the late filed opposition. Plaintiff shall file and serve an amended opposing separate statement of facts that complies with CRC 3.1350(f) and (h) by December 27, 2016. Plaintiff must provide a citation to the evidence by exhibit, title, page, and line number for each fact that disputes defendant's facts. Defendant may file and serve a reply by January 4, 2017. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576 =302/ru

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Truth Of Matters Admitted And To Compel Answers To Discovery
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Continued To Jan-10-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Albert Lee, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.215.6868, for defendants;
Vincent Weller, in pro per, for plaintiffs - (late appearance after the hearing concluded).

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The Request for Accommodation for Disability resulted in a continuance of the motion to January 10, 2017, to commence at 9:30 a.m. Hearing re DEFENDANT STEVEN MIYAKE Motion To Deem Truth Of Matters Admitted And To Compel Answers To Discovery is continued to January 10, 2017, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept.302/Discovery. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-23-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
